title: Mauritius 7-Day Beach Getaway
metaTitle: Mauritius 7-Day Beach Getaway | Flights, Hotels & Tours Included
metaDescription: Book a 7-day trip to Mauritius, Mauritius: round-trip flights, hotel, breakfast, transfers, and guided tours including Le Morne Brabant guided hike and Chamarel Seven Coloured Earths. Prices from $2021 per person (estimate).
highlights: Private catamaran cruise to Ile aux Cerfs
overview: Spend 7 days discovering Mauritius, Mauritius — Tropical maritime climate with a warm, humid summer carrying cyclone risk (Nov-Apr) and a cooler, drier winter (May-Oct). May to December for warm, drier weather with lower humidity; avoid the cyclone-prone January to March period for the calmest seas. This itinerary blends Le Morne Brabant guided hike, Chamarel Seven Coloured Earths, Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao) with free time to explore at your own pace, backed by round-trip flights, handpicked accommodation, and a dedicated travel consultant from enquiry through departure.
included: Round-trip economy-class airfare from your selected origin city (upgrade to premium economy or business available)
6 nights accommodation in your selected category (Budget, Mid-range, Premium, or Luxury)
Daily local transport as per the itinerary
Guided tours including Le Morne Brabant guided hike, Chamarel Seven Coloured Earths, Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao)
All entrance fees for attractions and activities listed in the itinerary
Applicable taxes and OTA service fee
Dedicated travel consultant support from booking through departure
notIncluded: Visa fees and travel document costs (see Visa Information)
Travel insurance (strongly recommended, available as an add-on)
Lunches and dinners except where noted in the itinerary
Optional activities not listed in the day-by-day itinerary
Airline seat selection and baggage upgrades
Any fare difference for premium economy or business class upgrades

itinerary.title: Arrive in Mauritius
itinerary.description: Land at Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam International Airport (MRU) and take your included private transfer to your hotel. After settling in, ease into the trip with a relaxed visit to Le Morne Brabant guided hike — UNESCO World Heritage mountain with lagoon views. Round off the evening with a welcome dinner introducing you to local flavors.

itinerary.title: Mauritius: Chamarel Seven Coloured Earths & Casela Nature Parks
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Chamarel Seven Coloured Earths — Naturally striped volcanic sand dunes. In the afternoon, continue to Casela Nature Parks — Wildlife park with lions, zebras, and ziplines. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.

itinerary.title: Mauritius: Ile aux Cerfs Island day trip & Black River Gorges National Park guided hike
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Ile aux Cerfs Island day trip — Boat trip to a lagoon island with white-sand beaches. In the afternoon, continue to Black River Gorges National Park guided hike — Rainforest trails with waterfalls and endemic birds. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.
activities: Ile aux Cerfs Island day trip
Black River Gorges National Park guided hike

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Ile aux Cerfs
itinerary.description: Full-day excursion to Ile aux Cerfs, a popular side trip from Mauritius. Return to Mauritius in the evening with time free to explore on your own.
activities: Guided day trip: Ile aux Cerfs

itinerary.title: Leisure Day & Optional Activities
itinerary.description: A lighter day to recharge, shop, or add an optional experience. Popular choices include Rodrigues Island day trip — your consultant can book add-ons like this on request.

itinerary.title: Mauritius: Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam Botanical Garden & Blue Bay Marine Park glass-bottom boat
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam Botanical Garden — Famous giant water lilies at Pamplemousses. In the afternoon, continue to Blue Bay Marine Park glass-bottom boat — Coral reef viewing in a protected marine park. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.
activities: Blue Bay Marine Park glass-bottom boat

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.description: Enjoy a final morning at leisure — perhaps one last visit to Aventure du Sucre or some souvenir shopping — before your private transfer to MRU for your departure flight.

travelTips: Rent a car for flexibility exploring beyond the resort strip
Visit Chamarel and Black River Gorges together, as they're close by
Book Ile aux Cerfs catamaran trips in advance during peak season
The west coast (Flic en Flac) has calmer waters than the wilder south
Pace yourself — this itinerary includes free time so you are not rushing between every attraction.
packingList: Copies of booking confirmations and travel insurance
Lightweight, breathable clothing and a reusable water bottle
Lightweight clothing plus a light layer for cooler winter evenings (Jun-Aug)
Water shoes for rocky lagoon areas
thingsToDo: Ile aux Cerfs Island day trip
Black River Gorges National Park guided hike
Blue Bay Marine Park glass-bottom boat
Rhumerie de Chamarel rum tasting tour
thingsToAvoid: Swimming outside the reef where currents are dangerous
Timeshare presentations disguised as free excursions
Overpaying taxi day tours without agreeing a price first
Traveling during cyclone season (Jan-Mar) without flexible bookings
topRestaurants: La Table du Château — French fine dining ($$$$)
Chez Tante Athalie — Mauritian home-style Creole ($)
1974 Restaurant Grand Baie — Modern Mauritian fine dining ($$$)
instagramSpots: Underwater waterfall illusion off Le Morne
familyActivities: La Vanille Nature Park giant tortoises
luxuryExperiences: Private catamaran cruise to Ile aux Cerfs
Overwater dining at a five-star resort
Spa retreat at a luxury beachfront resort
budgetExperiences: Public beach access at Flic en Flac or Mont Choisy
Port Louis Central Market food stalls
Self-guided Trou aux Cerfs crater walk

festivalCalendar.name: Maha Shivaratree (major Hindu pilgrimage to Grand Bassin)

localEtiquette: Dress modestly away from resort and beach areas.
Remove shoes when entering Hindu or Buddhist temples.
Ask permission before photographing locals or religious ceremonies.
Observe appropriate customs at each site given the island's Hindu, Muslim, Christian, and Creole mix.
A tip of around 10% is appreciated in restaurants, though not obligatory.
localTransportGuide: Renting a car is popular and affordable for exploring independently; local buses are cheap but slow, so most visitors use resort shuttles, taxis, or hired drivers for day trips. The Bolt ride-hailing app operates in the main tourist areas.
bestTimeToVisit: May to December for warm, drier weather with lower humidity; avoid the cyclone-prone January to March period for the calmest seas.
weather: Tropical maritime climate with a warm, humid summer carrying cyclone risk (Nov-Apr) and a cooler, drier winter (May-Oct).
visaInformation: Visa-free entry for most tourist nationalities including the US, UK, EU, India, Australia, and Canada, typically for stays up to 60-90 days, provided the passport is valid and a return ticket can be shown.
averageFlightTime: ~12.3h from major hubs (estimate; varies by origin — see Suggested Flights)
cancellationPolicy: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus a $99 processing fee. 15-29 days before departure: 50% refund. 0-14 days before departure or no-show: non-refundable. Airline and hotel supplier cancellation terms may be stricter than this policy and apply in addition — your travel consultant confirms exact terms before payment is taken. No online payment is collected on this site; a consultant confirms final pricing and availability with you directly before any booking is confirmed.
termsAndConditions: Pricing shown is per person based on the traveler type and tier selected and is an estimate pending live fare and rate confirmation.
Passports must be valid for at least 6 months beyond the return date for most destinations — confirm the exact requirement for your nationality.
Itinerary order may change due to weather, local conditions, or attraction closures; inclusions remain equivalent.
Solo travelers incur a single-room supplement, reflected in the Solo pricing tier.
This package does not include international travel insurance unless explicitly listed under Included.
Prices shown in a currency other than USD are approximate conversions at the rate noted and are not a payment quote.

faqs.question: Do I need a visa to visit Mauritius?
faqs.answer: Visa-free entry for most tourist nationalities including the US, UK, EU, India, Australia, and Canada, typically for stays up to 60-90 days, provided the passport is valid and a return ticket can be shown.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit Mauritius?
faqs.answer: May to December for warm, drier weather with lower humidity; avoid the cyclone-prone January to March period for the calmest seas. Tropical maritime climate with a warm, humid summer carrying cyclone risk (Nov-Apr) and a cooler, drier winter (May-Oct).

faqs.question: What's included in this package?
faqs.answer: Round-trip airfare, accommodation, daily breakfast, airport transfers, daily local transport, and guided tours to the attractions listed in the itinerary. See the Included / Not Included sections for full detail.

faqs.question: Can the itinerary be customized?
faqs.answer: Yes — this itinerary is a starting point. Your travel consultant can add, remove, or reorder activities, extend your stay, or upgrade your hotel category before you book.

faqs.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus a $99 processing fee. 15-29 days before departure: 50% refund. 0-14 days before departure or no-show: non-refundable. Airline and hotel supplier cancellation terms may be stricter than this policy and apply in addition — your travel consultant confirms exact terms before payment is taken. No online payment is collected on this site; a consultant confirms final pricing and availability with you directly before any booking is confirmed.

faqs.question: Is Mauritius safe for tourists?
faqs.answer: Mauritius is generally safe for tourists who take standard precautions — avoid poorly lit areas at night, keep valuables secure, and use licensed transport.

faqs.question: What currency should I bring to Mauritius?
faqs.answer: The local currency is MUR. Cards and mobile payments are widely accepted, and ATMs are easy to find.

faqs.question: Is this package good for a honeymoon or family trip?
faqs.answer: Yes — Mauritius is one of our most-booked honeymoon destinations, especially the Private beach dinner at sunset experience.

reviews.author: Hiroshi Kim
reviews.title: Exceeded our expectations
reviews.body: Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam Botanical Garden alone was worth the trip, but combined with Casela Nature Parks this itinerary really delivered. Breakfast at the hotel was good every day and the local guide was knowledgeable.

reviews.author: Fatima Santos
reviews.title: Perfect for our honeymoon
reviews.body: Le Morne Brabant guided hike alone was worth the trip, but combined with Port Louis Central Market this itinerary really delivered. Breakfast at the hotel was good every day and the local guide was knowledgeable.

reviews.author: Ava Ivanov
reviews.title: Beautiful destination, well organized
reviews.body: Chamarel waterfall viewpoint alone was worth the trip, but combined with Aventure du Sucre this itinerary really delivered. Breakfast at the hotel was good every day and the local guide was knowledgeable.

reviews.author: James Sharma
reviews.title: A little rushed but still wonderful
reviews.body: Our trip to Mauritius was fantastic from start to finish. The hotel was clean and well located, and the guided visit to Caudan Waterfront was a real highlight. Airport transfers were on time both ways.

reviews.author: Omar Botha
reviews.title: Five stars, will return
reviews.body: We added a couple of optional activities beyond Caudan Waterfront and don't regret it. Good value for what was included, and the food recommendations from our guide were spot on.

reviews.author: Priya Dubois
reviews.title: Highly recommend this package
reviews.body: Booked this as a couple trip and it was well paced. Le Morne Brabant guided hike in particular stood out. A couple of the transfers ran a little late but nothing that spoiled the trip.
